assets.caption: PR review mode with approve, request changes, and open on web actions
Request changes comment ready to submit
Approved PR marked reviewed in the queue

scenario.title: Approve, request changes, and open a PR on the web
steps: Open a PR from the inbox
Verify all review actions are available
Open the PR URL on the web
Request changes with a comment and verify the reviewed state
Approve another queued PR and verify the reviewed state

assertions.description: Review mode exposes Approve, Request changes, and Open on web actions
Open on web launches the selected pull request URL
Request changes requires a comment and marks the PR reviewed
Approve marks another queued PR reviewed

prMarkdown:
## Visual Evidence
### Approve, request changes, and open a PR on the web

![PR review mode with approve, request changes, and open on web actions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CKGrafico/orbion/4cecd344234a7045bd087fc6deef6b3989d6ec45/openspec/changes/gh-155-approve-request-changes-open-web/evidence/01-review-actions.webp)
![Request changes comment ready to submit](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CKGrafico/orbion/4cecd344234a7045bd087fc6deef6b3989d6ec45/openspec/changes/gh-155-approve-request-changes-open-web/evidence/02-request-changes.webp)
![Approved PR marked reviewed in the queue](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CKGrafico/orbion/4cecd344234a7045bd087fc6deef6b3989d6ec45/openspec/changes/gh-155-approve-request-changes-open-web/evidence/03-approved.webp)

<details>
<summary>Automated validation scenario</summary>

1. Open a PR from the inbox
2. Verify all review actions are available
3. Open the PR URL on the web
4. Request changes with a comment and verify the reviewed state
5. Approve another queued PR and verify the reviewed state

</details>
